# Vellum

> Vellum is an enterprise communications archive. It captures every customer
> communication sent by enterprise marketing and messaging platforms — across
> all channels, marketing and transactional — and stores it immutably so it can
> be retrieved and proven years later.

## What it is
Vellum archives the output of enterprise communication platforms (Adobe Journey
Optimizer, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Campaign, Braze, Marketo Engage,
Iterable) across email, SMS, push, in-app, WhatsApp and direct mail. Every record
is write-once (WORM), SHA-256 integrity-verified, and retrievable in milliseconds
from any storage tier.

## Who it is for
Enterprises that send high volumes of machine-generated, personalized customer
communications and must retain and produce them for compliance, legal discovery,
and dispute resolution — in regulated sectors such as banking, insurance,
healthcare, telecom, retail and the public sector.

## Key facts
- Retrieval: any single record in ~400 ms, including from the coldest tier.
- Immutability: write-once retention locks + SHA-256 chain of custody.
- Coverage: marketing AND transactional, every channel, not email only.
- Compliance: supports SEC 17a-4(f), FINRA, MiFID II, GDPR record obligations.
- Architecture: API-first, with an embeddable record component for CRMs.
- Deployment: single-tenant, region-pinned, customer-managed keys; BYOC available.

## How it differs from per-mailbox archiving
Traditional archives are priced per mailbox/seat and built for human inboxes.
Vellum is engineered and priced for billions of platform-generated messages,
tiering records to low-cost storage while keeping retrieval instant.
